quest-indigo.usage: Decorative accents, gradients, active icon fills — not small text on white

quest-indigo-accessible.usage: Text links, buttons, focus rings on light backgrounds (WCAG AA)

ai-cyan.usage: AI highlights on dark backgrounds, logo gradient start — never body text on white

ai-cyan-accessible.usage: AI text and icons on light backgrounds (WCAG AA)

portal-violet.usage: Premium features, boss battles, gradient end

midnight.usage: Primary dark background, logo mark fill, headlines on light

slate-600.usage: Secondary text on light backgrounds (WCAG AA)

slate-500.usage: Placeholder text on light backgrounds only

slate-400.usage: Secondary text on dark backgrounds (WCAG AA)

slate-200.usage: Borders, dividers, body text on dark backgrounds

white.usage: Cards, text on dark, logo wordmark on dark

coach-blue.usage: AI coach panel accents — pair with white icon, not small text

quest-gradient.usage: Logo mark, hero backgrounds, decorative surfaces — not white text buttons

button-gradient.usage: Primary CTA buttons with white text (WCAG AA safe)

dark-surface.usage: App shell, dark mode page backgrounds
